channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation hits ‘Glamsterdam’ milestones, names new protocol leads
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation has finalized a new gas limit floor and improvement proposal for its “Glamsterdam” upgrade, which is likely to go live sometime in the third quarter of 2026.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: ‘I failed them’: Goliath Ventures CEO charged with crypto Ponzi apologizes
item.description: Christopher Delgado, the former Goliath Ventures CEO charged with fraud and money laundering, has publicly apologized to investors of what US prosecutors allege is a Ponzi scheme.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Bitmine slows Ethereum buys, targets December to own 5% of supply
item.description: Tom Lee doubles down on the crypto spring, points to the Ether price rising in correlation with software stocks as further evidence.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Hackers used AI to craft zero-day attack to bypass 2FA: Google
item.description: Google’s Threat Intelligence Group says it has “high confidence” a threat actor used an AI model to help discover and weaponize a vulnerability in a popular system admin tool.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: MARA shares sink on first-quarter revenue miss, $1.3B loss
item.description: MARA Holdings says Bitcoin mining remains the company’s “operational foundation” while it moves to expand into AI.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Bitcoin funding rates turn positive: Is BTC rally to $85K next?
item.description: Bitcoin’s funding rate turned positive as the cryptocurrency held the $80,000 level. Will an uptick in spot ETF inflows trigger a rally to $85,000?
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: Circle stock rallies 15% as Wall Street sees further upside in stablecoin adoption
item.description: Circle shares surged as analysts pointed to expanding stablecoin use cases and forecast significant upside as USDC adoption continues to gain traction.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Ethics remain sticking point as crypto market structure bill goes to markup
item.description: After months of delays, the Senate Banking Committee has set a Thursday markup for the CLARITY Act, but it would still need some Democrats’ support to pass on the Senate floor.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Solana ETF inflows show demand returning as traders eye SOL rally to $120
item.description: Solana ETFs recorded their strongest weekly inflow since February as SOL futures open interest climbed nearly 30%. Is SOL bracing for a rally to $120?
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Price predictions 5/11: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA
item.description: Bitcoin looks set for another blockbuster week, but potential resistance at $84,000 could complicate the rally. Will altcoin consolidation continue?
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Rakesh Upadhyay

item.title: Ripple receives $200M credit line to expand institutional prime brokerage
item.description: Financing from Neuberger Berman will increase Ripple Prime’s capacity to offer margin lending and other brokerage services to institutional clients trading across crypto and traditional markets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: MoonPay makes prediction markets push with Dawn Labs buy, AI tool launch
item.description: The payments company acquired Dawn Labs for an undisclosed amount, immediately announcing the creation of an AI tool that would provide “custom strategies” for trading on prediction markets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Bitcoin ‘golden cross’ appears for the first time since 2023: Will BTC price rally?
item.description: Bitcoin’s MVRV suggests a shift to bullish momentum as BTC's market structure strengthens, which may be an early sign of a new bull market.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Galaxy, Sharplink plan $125M institutional DeFi yield fund backed by ETH treasury
item.description: Sharplink will contribute $100 million in staked Ether to a Galaxy-managed fund as institutions seek to earn yield from crypto holdings without selling ETH.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Crypto and AI could be dirty words on 2026 midterm campaign trail
item.description: Voter attitudes toward the AI and crypto industries aren’t favorable in the US, and a spotlight on how much they’re spending could further alienate them ahead of the 2026 midterms.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Aaron Wood

item.title: Augustus gets conditional OCC approval for AI and stablecoin bank
item.description: Peter Thiel-backed Augustus has won conditional OCC approval for a US bank charter focused on AI-driven payments and stablecoin settlement infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Strategy resumes Bitcoin acquisitions with $43M BTC buy
item.description: Strategy added $43 million in Bitcoin last week after Michael Saylor drew mixed investor reactions for signaling potential BTC sales to fund dividend payments.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: DAPPOS launches xBubble: An AI agent that learns and uses AI for you
item.description: xBubble allows users to complete specific tasks with simpler prompts by automatically building and dispatching task-specific AI agents.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Advertorial

item.title: USDC issuer Circle raises $222M in Arc token presale valued at $3B
item.description: Circle raised $222 million in an ARC token presale led by a16z Crypto as Q1 revenue hit $694 million and USDC circulation climbed to $77 billion.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: XRP metrics line up bull signals for ‘full-scale rally’ to $2
item.description: XRP is giving hints that a price breakout may be underway, based on several technical and onchain indicators, with bulls eyeing $2 as the first stop.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Crypto funds log $858M in sixth straight week of inflows: CoinShares
item.description: Crypto ETPs drew $858 million in inflows last week, led by Bitcoin with $706 million, as sentiment improved and short-BTC funds saw $14 million of outflows.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: BTC price target becomes $85K next: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin faced a choice between consolidation and new local highs as $80,000 support held despite flash BTC price volatility and liquidity grabs.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Capital B raises $17.8M to expand its Bitcoin treasury
item.description: Capital B raised $17.8 million from investors, including Adam Back and TOBAM, saying proceeds could help add 182 BTC to its treasury.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Crypto.com receives UAE license for Dubai government crypto payments
item.description: Crypto.com says a new UAE Stored Value Facilities license will let residents pay Dubai government fees in crypto, as the company doubles down on regulated expansion in the Middle East and beyond.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: This Bitcoin price level will be 'end of the bears' if broken, says analyst
item.description: Bitcoin’s rejection at the 200-day EMA mirrors past 25% and 36% BTC sell-offs, fueling fears of another drop toward $60,000.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: Seven Democrats seen as ‘key’ to advancing CLARITY Act: Galaxy
item.description: The CLARITY Act, introduced in July 2025, stalled in January after Coinbase withdrew its support for the legislation over concerns about legal protections and stablecoin yields.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Veteran investor bets on Ethereum as AI agents drive tokenization demand
item.description: AI agents need “food,” and that food is not physical food; it is tokens, said Jordi Visser.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Australia plans capital gains tax changes affecting crypto investors: Report
item.description: The Albanese government’s budget plans to replace the 50% capital gains tax discount on assets held over 12 months with a model taxing full real gains adjusted for inflation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brian Quarmby

item.title: US banking lobby urges senators to close ‘stablecoin loophole’ ahead of crypto bill markup
item.description: Ahead of this week's expected Senate crypto bill vote, the American Bankers Association warned stablecoin yield provisions could help reduce bank deposits.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar
